word: H4062 - מַדְהֵבָה - madhêbâh - mad-hay-baw' - Golden city

sections.paragraph:
Original: מדהבה

Transliteration: madhêbâh

Phonetic: mad-hay-baw'

BDB Definition:

  1. boisterous, raging, behaviour, boisterous behaviour
  2. (CLBL) golden city, exactness of gold

Origin: perhaps from the equivalent of H1722

TWOT entry: 2125d

Part(s) of speech: Noun Feminine
